# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates an absolute time from a raw value.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: CFTimeInterval)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: The case’s raw value.

## Creating an Absolute Time

- **init(_:)**: Creates an absolute time from a raw value.
